title: T-015 — UI: OEE-002 Per-shift Heatmap page + cell_drill_modal (oee_shift_heatmap_page, 15-OEE-d)
prompt:
# T-015 — OEE-002 Per-shift Heatmap page UI

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §10.2, §15.1, §15.4 OEE-M-007, §15.7 + UX prototypes/design/15-OEE-UX.md:395-525
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx:211-377 (oee_shift_heatmap_page) + prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/modals.jsx:300-326 (cell_drill_modal)

## Goal
Server Component page `/oee/heatmap` rendering week selector + heatmap grid (up to 10 lines × 21 cells = 210) with industry-standard red/amber/green color scale (65/85 thresholds per §13.1) + 4 weekly KPI mini-cards + selected-cell detail panel + cell_drill_modal (OEE-M-007) on click, matching prototype 1:1.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/(oee)/heatmap/page.tsx` (RSC) calls T-012 loader with URL search params (?week=2026-W16, ?line=all|line_id, ?selLine=, ?selDay=, ?selShift=).
2. Client component `HeatmapClient`: renders role='grid' with gridcell + aria-label per cell (keep ARIA per translation note); heatColor() computed from OEE value vs 65/85 thresholds.
3. Selected-cell panel + cell_drill_modal opened on cell click — calls T-012 cell-drill Server Action; shows full A/P/Q ArcGauge quartet + snapshot count + gap detection ("432 / 480 · 1 gap" pattern from translation note).
4. Compare Weeks trigger button → opens OEE-M-010 modal (covered in T-020 modal-suite task — this task wires trigger button only).
5. Heatmap color scale fixed P1 (65/85) per OQ-OEE-07 decision; settings note about P2 tenant-configurable (just a note in settings UI, not here).
6. RTL test snapshot + parity checklist against prototype line range.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(oee)/heatmap/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/heatmap/_components/heatmap-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/heatmap/_components/cell-drill-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/heatmap/_components/__tests__/heatmap-client.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx [ref]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx:211-377 (oee_shift_heatmap_page), then it has the same week selector + 10×21 grid + 4 weekly KPI mini-cards + selected-cell detail panel layout — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist.
2. Given a cell has OEE=72%, when rendered, then its CSS variable / Tailwind arbitrary value resolves to the amber band (65-85% per §13.1) and aria-label reads "LINE-02 sat Night OEE 72 percent".
3. Given a user clicks a cell, when interaction settles, then cell_drill_modal (prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/modals.jsx:300-326) opens with A/P/Q ArcGauge quartet + snapshot count + gap detection populated by T-012 cell-drill Server Action — verified by RTL parity checklist.
4. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright unavailable, document blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test asserting parity + color band + cell-drill interaction.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/(oee)/heatmap`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not use HTML <table> for the grid — role='grid' with gridcell + aria-label per translation note (a11y).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not bypass cell_drill_modal — fall-back to inline panel is a parity regression.
- Do not make color scale tenant-configurable in P1 (OQ-OEE-07 decision: fixed 65/85).
- Do not omit ARIA attributes — heatmap accessibility gate.

pipeline_inputs.description: OEE-002 heatmap page (RSC + client grid) with 10×21 cells + 4 weekly KPIs + selected-cell drill modal matching oee_shift_heatmap_page prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist: (1) week selector ISO-week format, (2) role='grid' with aria-label per cell, (3) fixed 65/85 P1 thresholds per §13.1 + OQ-OEE-07, (4) 4 weekly KPI cards (factoryAvg/bestLine/worstLine/totalOutput) from T-012 loader, (5) cell-drill modal OEE-M-007 with ArcGauge quartet, (6) Compare Weeks trigger (modal in T-020 scope). Backlog items BL-OEE-02/03/04 (sort by shift / color-blind / arrow-key nav) deferred.

Additional acceptance detail:
- Cell aria-label format `<line_id> <day> <shift> OEE <n> percent`.
- UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence + Playwright trace where applicable per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.
out_of_scope: Compare Weeks modal OEE-M-010 (T-020 modal suite)
